REQ-2026-03-00840 has been approved by Priya Nair (CFO) for ₹18,50,000. SAP posting is in progress.
Mining Operations Capex has consumed 88% of its quarterly budget (₹1,76,00,000 of ₹2,00,00,000). Remaining: ₹24,00,000.
REQ-0841 exceeds single-approval limit of ₹50,00,000. Dual CFO sign-off mandatory under Policy VED-FIN-42. Cannot proceed without escalation.
Real-time GL account validation is enabled. Budget figures sync every 15 minutes from SAP S/4HANA.

ABC Mining Equipment flagged — 3 of last 5 POs had delivery delays exceeding 15 days.
Requestor and approver are not the same person. No conflict detected.
Account 51100 — Capex Machinery verified in SAP S/4HANA master data.
Amount ₹75,00,000 exceeds single-approval limit (₹50,00,000). Requires dual CFO sign-off per Policy VED-FIN-42.
Budget is available, but a policy violation requires dual sign-off. Recommend routing to CFO Priya Nair for co-approval. Suggest adding vendor performance clause to PO before issuance.
